        (function() {
          var errorQueue = [];
          var newRelicReady = false;

          function flushErrorQueue() {
            if (window.newrelic && errorQueue.length > 0) {
              newRelicReady = true;
              const buildTag = document.body.dataset.buildTag || '';
              const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location?.search || '');
              // Normalize param keys to lowercase
              const normalized = {};
              for (const [key, value] of params.entries()) {
                normalized[key.toLowerCase()] = value;
              }

              const cellcode = normalized["cell"] ?? null;
              const icellcode = normalized["icell"] ?? null;
              window.newrelic.setCustomAttribute('Cell', cellcode || '');
              window.newrelic.setCustomAttribute('ICell', icellcode || '');
              window.newrelic.setCustomAttribute('BuildTag', buildTag);
              if (buildTag) window.newrelic.addRelease("creditcards", buildTag);
            }
            if (window.newrelic && errorQueue.length > 0) {
              while (errorQueue.length > 0) {
                var errorData = errorQueue.shift();
                window.newrelic.noticeError('ResourceLoadError', errorData);
              }
            }
          }

          function handleResourceError(element) {
            var tagName = element.tagName.toLowerCase();
            var resourceUrl = element.src || element.href || 'unknown';
            var isCrossOrigin = !resourceUrl.startsWith(window.location.origin);

            var urlParams = {};
            try {
              if (resourceUrl !== 'unknown') {
                var url = new URL(resourceUrl, window.location.origin);
                url.searchParams.forEach(function(value, key) {
                  urlParams[key] = value;
                });
              }
            } catch (e) {
              // Invalid URL, skip parameter extraction
            }

            var errorData = {
              errorType: tagName + 'LoadError',
              resourceType: tagName,
              failedResourceUrl: resourceUrl,
              pageUrl: window.location.href,
              crossOriginRequest: isCrossOrigin,
              urlParameters: urlParams
            };

            if (window.newrelic && newRelicReady) {
              window.newrelic.noticeError('ResourceLoadError', errorData);
            } else {
              errorQueue.push(errorData);
            }
          }

          // Check for New Relic periodically and flush queue
          var checkInterval = setInterval(function() {
            if (window.newrelic) {
              flushErrorQueue();
              clearInterval(checkInterval);
            }
          }, 100);

          // Stop checking after 5 seconds
          setTimeout(function() {
            clearInterval(checkInterval);
          }, 5000);

          var observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
            mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
              mutation.addedNodes.forEach(function(node) {
                if (
                  (node.tagName === 'SCRIPT' && node.src) ||
                  (node.tagName === 'IMG' && node.src) ||
                  (node.tagName === 'LINK' && node.rel === 'stylesheet' && node.href)
                ) {
                  node.addEventListener('error', function() {
                    handleResourceError(this);
                  });
                }
              });
            });
          });

          if (document.documentElement) {
            observer.observe(document.documentElement, {
              childList: true,
              subtree: true
            });
          }
        })();

Morgan Reserve, or Chase Sapphire Reserve for Business card must be included and used as the payment method within the Lyft app to receive the $10 credit each month. Using a $10 credit on a Lyft ride requires Lyft to share ride credit details with Chase to verify eligibility. PayPal or digital wallets (like Apple Pay and Google Wallet) are excluded from this offer. All Lyft products and services are subject to the Lyft Terms of Service."])</script><script nonce="gUczJ/uKI9Y3JQZlFL/jvQ==">self.__next_f.push([1,"86:T6f4,"])</script><script nonce="gUczJ/uKI9Y3JQZlFL/jvQ==">self.__next_f.push([1," Eligible cardmembers include: Chase Sapphire Reserve and J.P. Lyft credits can only be used on Standard, Extra Comfort, XL, Black, or Black SUV ride modes. The credit may not apply to all Lyft charges or services, for example, fees, taxes, tip, and gift card purchases are excluded. When applied to your ride, the $10 credit will apply only to the subtotal of your Lyft ride at payment. The credit will be automatically applied on eligible rides with the option to remove, except for when checking out on a Lyft Business Profile, which will allow for the option to apply the credit but it will not be automatically applied. The credit may not be combined with other credits or discounts available on the Lyft platform. Only one $10 credit per card account may be redeemed each month and credits unused at the end of the month will be forfeited. The credit may not be available on Lyft purchases made outside of the U.S., U.S. territories, and Canada. Lyft credits have no cash value and are non-transferable. Chase is not responsible for the provision of, or the failure to provide, Lyft benefits and services. Your Chase account must be open and not in default, and your Chase Sapphire Reserve, J.P. Morgan Reserve, or Chase Sapphire Reserve for Business card must be included and used as the payment method within the Lyft app to receive the $10 credit each month. Using a $10 credit on a Lyft ride requires Lyft to share ride credit details with Chase to verify eligibility. PayPal or digital wallets (like Apple Pay and Google Wallet) are excluded from this offer. All Lyft products and services are subject to the Lyft Terms of Service."])</script><script nonce="gUczJ/uKI9Y3JQZlFL/jvQ==">self.__next_f.push([1,"af:T6f4,"])</script><script nonce="gUczJ/uKI9Y3JQZlFL/jvQ==">self.__next_f.push([1," Eligible cardmembers include: Chase Sapphire Reserve and J.P.
